{{CargoClone
|name=Odysseus
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=198
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Quantum Amp production +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +2.5%
|}}
